_comment: MCP client config that spawns the FrameGraph MCP inside the font-rich container.
Build the image first: `docker build -t frameforge .` (or `make docker-build`).
Copy this into your client's MCP config (e.g. replace .mcp.json's `framegraph` entry).
Mounts — both matter for a foreign codebase:
framegraph-work:/work    named volume; MCP session artifacts and SDK clients
across runs. Retrieve artifacts MCP-natively with
get_session_resource, or `docker cp` from the volume.
${PWD}:/workspace:ro     YOUR project, read-only. Reference its files in tool
exist inside the container). Claude Code expands
${PWD}; other clients: replace with the absolute path.
FRAMEGRAPH_MCP_INPUT_ROOTS confines propose/vision inputs to the mounted roots
(plus the in-image repo) so the server cannot read arbitrary container paths.
Freshness: `docker run --rm frameforge version` — rebuild after updating the repo.
